titleEn: Coles and Ever.Ag partner on smarter meat supply chain
titleZh: Coles与Ever.Ag合作打造更智能的肉类供应链
summaryZh: 澳大利亚超市巨头Coles与全球农业食品技术领导者Ever.Ag合作，将先进数据科学和优化建模引入其复杂的鲜肉供应链。通过Ever.Ag的S&OP平台，Coles实现了从手动协调到自动化数据建模的转变，将规划时间从数小时缩短至分钟，并提高了规划准确性、客户响应能力和运营效率。未来，双方计划从基于数量的优化转向基于价值的优化，纳入盈利能力、运营效率和客户成果等因素，以平衡效率与环境影响。
translationZh:
Coles超市已与全球农业食品技术领导者Ever.Ag合作，将先进的数据科学和优化建模引入Coles高度复杂的鲜肉供应链。此次合作标志着在牛肉、羊肉和猪肉品类中迈向更快、更智能运营的重要一步。

历史上，肉类供应规划需要数小时的手动协调、电子表格和深厚的机构知识。现在，使用Ever.Ag的S&OP平台，Coles自动摄取和建模来自其运营各环节的数据，生成优化的生产和部署计划，并附带预测性洞察和内置合规规则。

自实施以来，Coles已实现：
- 通过自动化数据建模，将规划时间从数小时缩短至数分钟。
- 在牛肉、羊肉和猪肉品类中一致地应用业务政策。
- 通过将机构知识嵌入系统，降低运营风险。
- 提高客户响应能力，以应对不断变化的需求。
- 提高规划准确性，更好地支持肉类品类的新鲜度和定价管理。
- 强化规划能力，支持更高效的生产和库存管理。

相关：Hormel将巴西Ceratti业务出售给Zanchetta

“肉类是食品零售中最复杂的供应链之一，”Ever.Ag首席执行官Scott Sexton表示。“通过大规模应用数据科学，Coles展示了当高级分析与实际运营相结合时所能实现的成果。”

“我们的首要任务是为客户提供最佳体验，”Coles超市运营执行总经理Martin Smithson表示。“这种方法有助于确保以合适的价格提供最新鲜的肉品。”

展望未来，Coles和Ever.Ag计划从基于数量的优化转向基于价值的优化，将盈利能力、运营效率和客户成果等因素纳入相同的规划模型。下一阶段将使Coles能够模拟情景、预测市场波动，并做出平衡效率与环境影响的决策。

Ever.Ag提供创新的农业技术解决方案和服务，涵盖市场情报、风险管理和尖端软件，支持乳制品、畜牧、作物和农业综合企业领域更智能、更可持续的运营。
featuredReason: 该案例展示了数据科学和自动化在复杂肉类供应链中的实际应用，为智慧畜牧行业提供了从手动规划到智能决策的转型范例，具有重要的实践参考价值。
contentFull: Market NewsPork Market NewsNewsColes and Ever.Ag partner on smarter meat supply chainCollaboration introduces advanced data science to optimize planning across fresh beef, pork and lamb categories.Industry ReleaseJune 25, 2026schedule1 Min ReadEver.AgColes Supermarkets has partnered with Ever.Ag, a global agrifood technology leader, to introduce advanced data science and optimization modeling into Coles' highly complex fresh meat supply chain. This collaboration marks a major step toward faster, smarter operations across beef, lamb and pork categories.Historically, planning for meat supply required hours of manual coordination, spreadsheets and deep institutional knowledge. Now, using Ever.Ag's S&OP platform, Coles automatically ingests and models data from across its operations, producing optimized production and deployment plans complete with predictive insights and built-in compliance rules.Since implementation, Coles has:Cut planning time from hours to minutes through automated data modeling.Applied business policies consistently across beef, lamb and pork.Reduced operational risk by embedding institutional knowledge into the system.Improved customer responsiveness to meet changing demand.Improved planning accuracy to better support the management of freshness and pricing across meat categories.Strengthened planning capabilities to support more efficient production and inventory management.Related:Hormel to sell Ceratti business in Brazil to Zanchetta"Meat is one of the most complex supply chains in food retail," said Scott Sexton, chief executive officer of Ever.Ag. "By applying data science at scale, Coles is showing what's possible when advanced analytics meet real-world operations.""Our priority is delivering the best experience for our customers," said Martin Smithson, Coles executive general manager supermarket operations. "This approach helps ensure the freshest cuts are available at the right price."Looking ahead, Coles and Ever.Ag plan to move from volume-based to value-based optimization, incorporating factors such as profitability, operational efficiency and customer outcomes into the same planning models. This next phase will enable Coles to simulate scenarios, anticipate market swings and make decisions that balance efficiency with environmental impact.Ever.Ag provides innovative AgTech solutions and services, with market intelligence, risk management and cutting-edge software that enable smarter, more sustainable operations across dairy, livestock, crops and agribusiness sectors.About the contentHtml: Collaboration introduces advanced data science to optimize planning across fresh beef, pork and lamb categories.
